purpose: Own one project's goal, state, routing, loop prevention, and worker assignment.
when_to_call: Whenever Tim starts or resumes a project lane.
allowed_reads: TSF repo control docs; project registry; mission packets; project status; preservation packets; approved inbox evidence
allowed_writes: TSF mission drafts; routing notes; project-main-bot status artifacts
forbidden_actions: push;merge;deploy;install;migration;secrets;PrivateLens;all-fleet;background runner;product repo mutation;canonical NWR;normal NWR packets;app/model/ranking/source-truth promotion
output_contract: One bounded mission packet or TIM_REQUIRED packet with routing rationale.
tim_required_for: Any restricted action, product direction ambiguity, cross-lane expansion, or remote/API action.
notes: May spawn workers only by authoring bounded mission packets.

purpose: Convert Tim natural language into mission intent and convert technical results back into Tim-readable summary.
when_to_call: When a user request is fuzzy, broad, multi-part, or not yet structured.
allowed_reads: Tim prompt; TSF control docs; quick mission; work-order inbox; project passports
allowed_writes: Mission intent draft; questions register; summary note
forbidden_actions: treating user prose as approval; product mutation; command execution; push;merge;deploy;secrets
output_contract: Mission intent with goal, allowed scope, excluded scope, stop conditions, and exact questions if needed.
tim_required_for: Ambiguous product direction, missing authority, or unclear project identity.
notes: Should ask Tim only when local evidence cannot resolve a true blocker.

purpose: Maintain current project memory, freshness, handoff, and source trace.
when_to_call: Before mission authoring, after preservation, or when context is stale.
allowed_reads: project passports; next-session cards; status freshness index; preservation packets; artifact index
allowed_writes: Context capsule; freshness note; do-not-rebuild register
forbidden_actions: source-truth promotion; product repo mutation; normal NWR reads; credential access
tim_required_for: Access to product/private repos, stale/conflicting source truth, or archived reactivation.
notes: Should separate current truth from stale evidence.

purpose: Coordinate branch/worktree lane isolation and collision detection.
when_to_call: When more than one lane or worker could touch overlapping files.
allowed_reads: git status; branch metadata; worktree boundary records; mission allowed writes
allowed_writes: Lane split plan; collision matrix; branch/worktree recommendation
forbidden_actions: creating/deleting worktrees without approval; merge;push;rebase;all-fleet;background runner
output_contract: Lane plan with ownership, collision result, stop signs, and merge recommendation.
tim_required_for: Any actual worktree creation/deletion, merge, push, rebase, or conflicting scope.

purpose: Organize files, packets, manifests, checklists, and status surfaces.
when_to_call: When evidence exists but is hard to navigate.
allowed_reads: TSF docs; review packets; status files; artifact indexes
allowed_writes: TSF-local docs, manifests, indexes, status summaries
forbidden_actions: product repo mutation; canonical NWR mutation; push;merge;deploy;secrets
output_contract: Sorted index, manifest, or checklist with source trace.
tim_required_for: Deleting, moving, or overwriting user/canonical work.
notes: Can commit locally if TSF-local docs only and validation passes.

purpose: Implement bounded TSF-local infrastructure or docs/control-plane changes.
when_to_call: When a mission has exact allowed writes and validation.
forbidden_actions: outside allowed writes; product repo mutation; push;merge;deploy;install;migration;secrets;background runner
output_contract: Changed files plus validation evidence and preservation handoff.
tim_required_for: Any scope expansion or restricted action.
notes: Must operate through kernel mission packet.

purpose: Build or adapt TSF UI/prototype surfaces when explicitly scoped.
when_to_call: When the mission is UI/prototype only and no runtime binding is approved.
forbidden_actions: runtime command binding; network ports; product mutation; auth; deploy;push;merge
output_contract: Static UI artifact or prototype review packet with no command authority.
tim_required_for: Real Operator Console wiring, command execution, remote auth, deploy, or product repo access.

purpose: Design or implement AI prompt/adapter/schema components inside TSF scope.
when_to_call: When a bounded mission needs AI routing, prompts, or HQ packet structure.
allowed_reads: TSF prompt docs; HQ adapter docs; schemas
allowed_writes: Prompt docs; packet schemas; fixture examples
forbidden_actions: API calls; credential creation; model/source-truth promotion; production ranking behavior
output_contract: Prompt/schema artifact with non-authority and validation notes.
tim_required_for: API usage, credentials, model behavior changes, production use.
notes: Do not call ChatGPT/API HQ unless separately approved.

purpose: Create review-only data audits, missingness tables, and validation summaries.
when_to_call: When a mission is data/source trace or formula review-only.
allowed_reads: Approved review-only data; TSF/NWR approved packets if scoped
forbidden_actions: production rankings; formula promotion; source truth promotion; canonical NWR mutation; normal NWR packet reads without approval
output_contract: Review-only dataset/report with source trace, missingness, caveats, and blocked uses.
tim_required_for: Source promotion, production/model use, canonical/normal NWR expansion.

purpose: Run or create bounded tests and validation harness checks.
when_to_call: When a mission has safe local test scope.
allowed_reads: Allowed test files; fixtures; changed files
forbidden_actions: all-fleet;proof runs;install;migration;product tests without approval;background runner
output_contract: Test result report with commands, pass/fail, and failures.
tim_required_for: Proof runs, installs, product repo tests, broad fleet tests.
notes: May add TSF-local tests when scoped.

purpose: Review changed scope, risks, evidence, and missing tests.
when_to_call: Before ready/merge decisions or when risk is unclear.
allowed_reads: Allowed diffs; review packets; validation output
allowed_writes: Audit report; risk register; recommendation JSON
forbidden_actions: approval on Tim's behalf; merge;push;product mutation
output_contract: Findings-first audit with merge/readiness recommendation and caveats.

purpose: Create packets, manifests, summaries, or review bundles.
when_to_call: When a mission needs durable handoff/export evidence.
forbidden_actions: sending/uploading packages; external account changes; secrets; product mutation
output_contract: Export packet with manifest and no-authority confirmation.
tim_required_for: Sending/uploading, external account changes, private data, or package publication.

purpose: Find existing assets and source evidence before build work.
when_to_call: At Phase 0 or before any claim something is missing.
allowed_reads: Allowed TSF docs; approved project materials; registries; packets
allowed_writes: Trace section; source map; do-not-rebuild register
forbidden_actions: forbidden cross-lane reads; normal NWR packets without scope; product repo access without approval
output_contract: Existing-asset trace with classification and reuse decision.
tim_required_for: Cross-lane expansion or protected repo/source access.
notes: This is the default first worker for unknown requests.

purpose: Verify expected artifacts, scope, forbidden actions, and final state.
when_to_call: After any worker result or before preservation/commit.
allowed_reads: Mission packet; worker result; git status; expected artifacts
forbidden_actions: weakening checks; approving future work; mutating product repos
tim_required_for: Any verifier needing forbidden reads or product access.

purpose: Perform bounded cleanup that preserves behavior and scope.
when_to_call: When exact files and tests are known.
forbidden_actions: broad redesign; hidden behavior change; product mutation without approval; push;merge
output_contract: Small diff, unchanged behavior statement, tests.
tim_required_for: Behavior changes, broad scope, product repos, or missing tests.

purpose: Write or update TSF docs, policies, role registries, and handoffs.
when_to_call: When the output is a durable local doc/control-plane artifact.
output_contract: Doc artifact with inputs, status, exclusions, and non-authority statement.
tim_required_for: Docs that imply restricted-action approval or production authority.

purpose: Preserve packets, handoffs, release notes, and final status.
when_to_call: Before cleanup, after validation, or before publication gates.
allowed_reads: Mission artifacts; verifier results; git metadata
allowed_writes: Preservation packet; status summary; approval packet draft
output_contract: Durable packet with manifest, final decision, and next action.
tim_required_for: Actual push, merge, deploy, branch cleanup, or external publication.

purpose: Provide strategic judgment for major choke points from a compact packet.
when_to_call: Only for major architecture switch, ambiguous YELLOW, source-truth/model promotion, repeated loop, or conflicting workers.
allowed_reads: HQ escalation packet; summarized evidence only
allowed_writes: Strategic decision JSON; no local file mutation unless transcribed by TSF worker
forbidden_actions: API call without approval; execution authority; product mutation; source-truth promotion
output_contract: GREEN/YELLOW/RED/TIM_REQUIRED strategic decision with allowed verdicts.
tim_required_for: Any API call, credentials, source-truth/model/ranking promotion, or restricted action.
notes: No API implementation in this lane.
